rationale: Educ. Code §44.908 governs school district expenditure of local funds from vending machines and similar sources. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A school district shall adopt a policy governing the expenditure of local funds from vending machines, rentals, gate receipts, or other local sources of revenue over which the district has direct control.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this school district local-funds expenditure rule.
